result.name: Improved STL Validator ASCII/Binary
result.description: Validates ASCII or binary STL meshes for closure, non-manifold edges, degeneracy, orientation consistency, normals, area, and signed volume.

args.content:
import json
import subprocess
import sys

files = [f'binary_{i:03d}.stl' for i in range(1, 11)]
all_ok = True
for path in files:
    p = subprocess.run([sys.executable, 'stl_validator.py', path], capture_output=True, text=True)
    try:
        obj = json.loads(p.stdout)
        ok = isinstance(obj, dict) and 'valid' in obj and 'issues' in obj and isinstance(obj['issues'], list)
    except Exception:
        ok = False
    print(path, p.returncode, ok, p.stdout.strip())
    if not ok:
        all_ok = False
sys.exit(0 if all_ok else 1)

manifest.name: Improved STL Validator ASCII/Binary CLI
manifest.description: Validates a single ASCII or binary STL file from the command line and prints JSON suitability results.
